offer.name: Productiv Pro — Team plan upgrade
offer.promise: Pro plan unlocks team collaboration, custom AI rules, priority support, and unlimited integrations
offer.audience: Existing free / Solo plan users hitting feature limits, English-speaking, US/UK/CA
proof_points: Average team upgrades within 14 days of hitting Solo limits
objections: Free tier already covers what I need
Is this a usage cap or a real Pro tier?

goal.notes: Upsell existing users, target 80 upgrades this month

input.brief: In-product nurture content surfaced via blog + LinkedIn. Angle: case studies of teams who upgraded and what they unlocked specifically. Concrete examples beat generic feature lists.

notes: Tests upsell narrative — Critic should reward concrete proof, penalize generic feature lists.
